plugins.name: excalidraw
plugins.description: Expert skill for creating and editing Excalidraw diagrams — flowcharts, mind maps, architecture diagrams, sequence diagrams, concept maps, and more. Uses the Excalidraw MCP tools with progressive rendering and checkpoint-based editing.
